Sandbox_PhunCure_DefDropRate_tooltip: The chance out of 100 of a cure carrying zed appearing. eg 10 = 10%, 5.5 = 5.5%
Sandbox_PhunCure_DefSprinterDropRate_too: The chance out of 100 that the sprinter is packing a cure. eg 10 = 10%, 5.5 = 5.5%. Requires Enable Sprinter Cure to be on
Sandbox_PhunCure_EnableSprinterCure_tool: If you are running a server with PhunServer and have different drop rates for sprinters to normal zeds, check this setting as PhunCure will require additional scanning on server
Sandbox_PhunCure_ExpiredChance_tooltip: The chance (out of 100) that the cure will already be rotten which can further increase rarity. Note that if you disabled rotting below (eg Days to Rot = 0) then this value will have no affect. 0 means they will always be fresh, 50 means that half of the cures found will be unusable
Sandbox_PhunCure_DaysRotten_tooltip: Number of days the cure is good for without keeping in fridge or freezer. Set to 0 or a crazy high number to disable (default is 4 days). Note this value only applies after a restart and only to newly created items
Sandbox_PhunCure_DaysFresh_tooltip: Number of days that the cure is considered fresh. Currently has no benefit. Default is 1 day. Note that changing this value only applies after a restart and to newly created items
Sandbox_PhunCure_CureInfection_tooltip: Injecting a valid cure will remove the knox virus
Sandbox_PhunCure_CureBite_tooltip: Injecting a valid cure will heal body part bite
Sandbox_PhunCure_CureWound_tooltip: Injecting a valid cure will remove any infected wound (eg instead of using anti biotics). This is different to the knox virus
Sandbox_PhunCure_CureScratch_tooltip: Injecting a valid cure will heal any scratch
